message.content:
Read the following files from /Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service and return their FULL contents verbatim:

1. src/main.ts
2. src/modules/app/app.module.ts
3. src/modules/env-config/env-config.module.ts
4. src/modules/env-config/env-config.service.ts (if exists, else look for similar files in that dir)
5. src/configs/env-validations.config.ts
6. src/utils/get-env-variable.util.ts
7. src/utils/get-env-file.util.ts
8. src/constants/env-variables.constant.ts (first 60 lines is enough)
9. src/modules/health/ - list all files and read them all
10. src/modules/app/ - list all files and read them all

Also list ALL directories under src/ (just top-level dirs and their immediate children, no deep nesting needed).

Return every file's full content verbatim.

content.text: I'll help you read those files. Let me start by exploring the directory structure and then read each file.
